back_translation: This is the third time I am coming to you. 'Every matter will be established by the mouths of two or three witnesses.'
I have spoken before, and I speak again — as if when I came the second time, and now though absent — to those who have sinned earlier and to all the rest, that when I come again, I will not refrain.
Since you seek proof that Christ speaks within me. He is not weak in confronting you, but is powerful among you.
For he was crucified out of weakness, but he lives by the power of God. And we ourselves are weak in him, but we will live together with him by the power of God in our action toward you.
Examine yourselves whether you are in the faith. Test yourselves. Or do you not understand yourselves that Jesus Christ dwells in you? — unless you fail the test.
I hope that you will know that we have not failed the test.
We pray to God that you would not do anything evil at all, not so that we would appear to have passed the test, but so that you would do what is good — even if we appear as those who failed the test.
For we cannot do anything against the truth, but only for the truth.
For we rejoice when we are weak but you are strong. This is what we pray for, namely the building up of you to completeness.
Therefore, I write these things while absent, so that when I am present I will not need to use my authority strictly — the authority that the Lord gave me for building up, not for tearing down.
Finally, brethren, rejoice. Build yourselves up to completeness. Encourage one another. Be of one heart and one mind. Live in peace. And the God of love and peace will be with you.
Greet one another with a holy kiss. All the saints send their remembrance to you.
May the grace of the Lord Jesus Christ, the love of God, and the participation in the Holy Spirit, be with all of you.
